name: Signature Raspberry Cake
description: Luxurious vanilla chiffon layers filled with organic raspberry compote, frosted with silk Swiss meringue buttercream, and topped with fresh raspberries.

name: Artisanal Rosetta Latte
description: Premium roasted espresso shots combined with perfectly steamed micro-foam milk, decorated with a hand-poured rosetta.

name: Royal Chocolate Truffle Slice
description: Decadent dark chocolate sponge cake layered with rich Belgian chocolate ganache, decorated with fresh forest berries.

name: Lemon Lavender Chiffon
description: Light lemon chiffon cake infused with organic culinary lavender, frosted with creamy lemon curd whipped cream.

name: Strawberry Crown Cupcake
description: Fluffy vanilla cupcake topped with a generous swirl of strawberry whipped cream and a fresh crown strawberry.

name: Salted Caramel Pecan Tart
description: Buttery shortcrust pastry shell filled with rich housemade salted caramel and toasted premium pecans.

name: Iced Matcha Pistachio Latte
description: Ceremonial grade Japanese Uji matcha whisked with cold milk and sweet pistachio cream over artisanal ice.

name: Red Velvet Elegance Cake
description: Velvety cocoa cake with signature crimson crumbs, layered with velvety sweet vanilla cream cheese frosting.
